subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath inspired His chosen servants and made them to recognize this Day that was inscribed in His Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی الهم عباده الاصفیاء و عرفهم هذا الیوم الذی کان مسطورا فی لوحه
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @Greatest Name
